analysis: The project contains multiple website versions (docs, test-website, github-page). The event.json specifies a black hole theme with animated objects, slides, and pages. The docs directory appears to be the most recent and complete version. The current UI lacks cohesive cosmic/black hole theming, animated slide transitions, and bulk animated objects. The existing files show basic HTML structure but need dark cosmic styling with animated elements.

improvements.description: Add cosmic black hole theme with dark background, animated starfield, swirling black hole patterns, and glowing text effects using CSS animations and gradients
Create animated slide sections with black hole content, interactive planet elements, and smooth transitions between cosmic-themed sections
Implement animated object functionality including swirling black hole animations, slide navigation, and interactive cosmic elements with smooth transitions
